title: The Page That Proves Itself
tagline: A page that fetches its own source, hashes it live in your browser, and attests to its own integrity.
holy_shit: This page knows its own SHA-256 — right now, in your browser. Change one byte and the displayed proof instantly breaks.
powered_by: native browser crypto.subtle + fetch — no server, no library, no trusted third party
agent_scenario: When you (an agent) need: a client-side, zero-dependency tamper-evident attestation that the artifact being served is byte-for-byte identical to what was originally published.
author: kody-w + Copilot
